commands.review_summary:
The PR updates scheduled live-check permissions, skips docs/website publish sync when cross-repo tokens are missing, and moves two Control UI Quick Settings labels into i18n locale outputs.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: the scheduled caller does not grant actions: read while the reusable Docker prep job requests it, and the publish workflows currently assume cross-repo tokens are present. I did not run the expensive scheduled live workflow.
